title: BEM-852 route retry verify
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 14:31 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
prev=load('governance/state/bem851_verify_protocol_review_retry.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
decision=prev.get('decision')
created_files=[]
if ps=='protocol_review_retry_found_approved':
    status='final_protocol_approved'
    final=Path('governance/protocols/BEM852_FINAL_MULTI_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_PROTOCOL_APPROVED.md')
    src=read('governance/protocols/BEM845_MULTI_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_PROTOCOL.md')
    final.write_text('# BEM-852 | FINAL Multi-Agent Development Protocol | APPROVED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+sep+src[:9000]+sep)
    created_files.append(str(final))
    next_action='resume roadmap implementation under final protocol'
elif ps.startswith('protocol_review_retry_found_'):
    status='protocol_review_changes_required'
    next_action='apply Claude requested changes and send next protocol version'
else:
    status='protocol_review_still_missing_next_retry_queued'
    msg=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem852_protocol_review_second_retry_to_claude.md')
    msg.write_text('# BEM-852 | Protocol review second retry to Claude'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous BEM-851 status: '+ps+sep+sep+'Return final protocol review for BEM-845/BEM-846/BEM-849. Required: Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem852_claude_protocol_review_second_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v13','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-852 second retry Claude final protocol review after BEM-851 missing','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(msg),str(q)])
    next_action='fresh tick and verify second retry response'
state={'bem':'BEM-852','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'decision':decision,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem852_route_after_protocol_retry_verify.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem852_route_after_protocol_retry_verify.md').write_text('# BEM-852 | Route After Protocol Retry Verify | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem852_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-852'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem852_route_after_protocol_retry_verify.json','governance/reports/bem852_route_after_protocol_retry_verify.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem852_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-851 review retry verification; finalized protocol if approved or queued next Claude retry if missing')
"""
No issue comments.
